## Description
Provide a brief description of the problem, any background context, and what the change accomplishes.

## Related Issues
- Closes #[issue_number]

## Verification Checklist
Before submitting this PR, please verify the following:
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have run `npm run lint` and resolved all warnings/errors
- [ ] I have verified the UI/UX changes on both mobile and desktop viewports
- [ ] I have ensured the changes do not degrade Lighthouse Core Web Vitals

## Security Checklist
- [ ] The code does not introduce any XSS vulnerabilities (e.g. `dangerouslySetInnerHTML` is audited)
- [ ] API endpoints have adequate input sanitization
- [ ] Sensitive data and credentials are not hardcoded or exposed

## Additional Context
Add any other context or screenshots about the pull request here.
